title: Make web UI dark-only (drop light-mode palette)
action: Remove the @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) block from web/src/styles.css so the app always uses the dark :root palette. Change the index.html color-scheme meta from 'dark light' to 'dark'. Dark-first design with a hardcoded-dark xterm terminal; the light palette washed out desktop and made the mobile terminal invisible.

truths: App renders the dark palette regardless of the OS prefers-color-scheme setting
Terminal text is readable on a light-mode device
artifacts: web/src/styles.css without a prefers-color-scheme light block
prohibitions: Do not change the root dark palette values
Do not alter terminal.ts TERMINAL_THEME colours

trace.outcome: Dark-only UI: removed prefers-color-scheme light block; app now renders dark on light-mode devices, terminal visible
trace.verify_output: built in 713ms; ../static/assets/index-8jGCzsuD.css 17.62 kB. Full repo verify: cargo test + clippy clean, web vitest 15 passed (3 files). Browser repro with prefers-color-scheme light forced: app renders dark, terminal text visible.
